top_signals.title: Ukraine’s newest strike weapon drifts into Russia on the wind
top_signals.summary: The U.S. and Russia are fielding the same balloons used by Ukraine that bait air defenses and now launch missiles.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Poland buys V-BAT drones to boost Baltic Sea naval operations
top_signals.summary: The deal puts Poland in line to become the first country on NATO’s eastern flank to acquire the Shield AI-made drone.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Three ‘cybercrime as a service’ operations undercut by Microsoft, law enforcement
top_signals.summary: Microsoft touted its latest action against malware infrastructure as a new approach aimed at the full cybercrime "supply chain." Europol said more than 300 servers were targeted.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Apple stock gets slammed on bigger Mac, iPad price hikes. Why it can weather the storm
top_signals.summary: The stock had its worst session in more than a year as management made its first official move to pass higher memory costs onto consumers.

top_signals.title: Messi, Ronaldo, Serena, Novak: What sport stars dodging retirement tells us
top_signals.summary: Sport heroes used to retire at the top but now the likes of Messi, Ronaldo, Serena and Djokovic have other ideas, writes Matt Readman. Sport is nothing if not storytelling. And every athlete wants the perfect ending to their own story. The crowning moment. The final wave to the crowd. Departing with dignity on your [...]
